And so then like that's been the main thing that's caused a lot of difficulties because the process of going in and like actually sending people messages and replying is like extremely valuable signals to LinkedIn.

When you interact with that comment back and forth is really, really high value.
But then when you message someone and they message you back and you go back and forth a few times, it is the highest of highest of highest of signals.
